/usr/bin/c++  -pthread -Wall -Wsuggest-override -Wstrict-null-sentinel -Wno-comment -Wno-unused-parameter -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/magicseteditor-updater.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/magicseteditor-updater.dir/src_updater/main.cpp.o" -o magicseteditor-updater   -L/opt/wxWidgets-3.3.1/lib64  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/wxWidgets-3.3.1/lib64 -L/opt/wxWidgets-3.3.1/lib64 -pthread -lwx_gtk3u_core-3.3 -lwx_baseu-3.3 -lwx_baseu_net-3.3 -lwx_gtk3u_html-3.3
